query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.consultorId, u.programId, IF(u.consultorId IS NOT NULL, 'MENTOR', 'GERENTE') as tipo_real FROM users u WHERE u.role = 'manager' AND (u.name LIKE '%Ana Carolina%' OR u.name LIKE '%Joseane%' OR u.name LIKE '%TESTE%' OR u.name LIKE '%teste%') ORDER BY u.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.consultorId, u.programId, IF(u.consultorId IS NOT NULL, 'MENTOR', 'GERENTE') as tipo_real FROM users u WHERE u.role = 'manager' AND (u.name LIKE '%Ana Carolina%' OR u.name LIKE '%Joseane%' OR u.name LIKE '%TESTE%' OR u.name LIKE '%teste%') ORDER BY u.name;
